nasb.text: We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son to be the Savior of the world.

esv.text: And we have seen and testify that the Father has sent his Son to be the Savior of the world.

cnv.text: 父差遣子作世人的救主，這是我們見過的，並且現在作見證。

ccb.text: 我们看见过，现在做见证：父差遣了祂的儿子成为世人的救主。

csbs.text: 我们已经见过，并且现在见证：父差派子做世界的救主，
